title: APEX Supabase Frontend Client Target Boundary Review
objective: Review the remaining deferred frontend client artifact `C:/APEX Platform/Supabase/lib/supabase.ts` against the current bootstrap app topology and determine whether any current app surface is an approved target home now, or whether the correct outcome remains explicit defer pending a future frontend app-boundary packet.
dependency_note: Packet 001h completed the approved helper-residue and lineage-wrapper routing tranche and left lib/supabase.ts as the only intentionally deferred artifact from the original Supabase helper slice.
constrained_outputs: A planning-only review handoff for the deferred frontend Supabase client artifact
An explicit assessment of current candidate app homes such as operations-web, field-surface, forms-studio, integration-surface, and control-plane-api
A bounded recommendation for either a real import packet or an explicit defer-closeout packet
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001i remains planning-only and does not move or edit lib/supabase.ts
Confirm each current app surface is evaluated against actual on-disk readiness rather than target-state aspiration alone
Confirm the review distinguishes target-state app names from currently usable app boundaries
Confirm the recommendation is either a concrete import lane or an explicit defer-closeout decision
sql_permission_note: Packet 001i is a planning-only frontend boundary review. It does not authorize file movement, runtime edits, environment activation, or dependency installation.
